title: Guardian Policy Manifest
description: JSON Schema for validating policy.yml sidecar manifest files in the Guardian Methodology Library.

id.description: Globally unique kebab-case slug for this policy. Must be stable across versions.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the catalog.

version.description: Semantic version of this Guardian policy implementation (not the upstream methodology version).

description.description: One-to-three sentence plain-English summary of what this policy does.

policy_type.description: Classification of the policy's relationship to upstream standards.

policy_type_note.description: Required when policy_type is 'other'. A short plain-English label for the actual policy type. Used to identify candidates for future enum promotion.

status.description: Lifecycle state of this Guardian implementation.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. Apache-2.0, MIT, CC-BY-4.0).

category.description: Broad domain this policy belongs to.

category_note.description: Required when category is 'other'. A short plain-English label for the actual category. Used to identify candidates for future enum promotion.

authors.description: Organizations or individuals primarily responsible for this Guardian implementation.

tags.description: Lowercase-hyphenated discovery tags. See TAG_TAXONOMY.md for guidance.

standard_body.description: Name of the standards organization that owns the upstream methodology (e.g. Verra, Gold Standard). Omit for community-developed policies.

methodology_id.description: Upstream methodology identifier as used by the standard body (e.g. VM0007, MECD, AMS-III.BA).

methodology_version.description: Version of the upstream methodology this policy implements, verbatim as published by the standard body.

token_type.description: Symbol or name of the token minted by this policy (e.g. VCU, VER, CER, EUDRT).

registry_status.description: Status of this policy/project with the external registry body.

registry_body.description: Name of the registry body that validated this policy (only meaningful when registry_status is validated).

registry_reference.description: Formal reference number assigned by the registry (e.g. a VCS project ID).

registry_accepted_date.description: ISO 8601 date on which the registry formally accepted or validated this policy.

hedera_timestamp.description: Hedera consensus timestamp of the most recent mainnet publication (or testnet if not yet on mainnet), as returned by Guardian's publish API. This is the timestamp of the Hedera message that carries the IPFS CID. Full publication history — all networks and versions — is recorded in publications.json by the record-publication script; never edit that file by hand.

sdg_alignment.description: UN Sustainable Development Goal numbers (1-17) that this policy directly supports.

sector.description: Primary economic sector of the underlying project activity.

guardian_version_min.description: Minimum Guardian platform version required to run this policy.

roles.description: Named roles defined in the policy workflow.

dependencies.description: Other Guardian modules or tool IDs this policy depends on.

id.description: ID of the dependency module (must match that module's id field).

version_min.description: Minimum version of the dependency required.

supersedes.description: ID of the policy this manifest replaces. Omit if this is the first version.

superseded_by.description: ID of the policy that replaces this one (set when status becomes superseded).

resources.description: External references relevant to this policy (methodology docs, regulatory texts, research papers).

url.description: URL to the resource (optional if the resource is described by label alone).

contributors.description: Individuals or organizations who contributed to this implementation but are not primary authors.

maintainers.description: Current maintainers responsible for keeping this policy up to date.

thumbnail.description: Relative path to a thumbnail image (from the policy.yml file location). Recommended: 400x300 PNG/JPEG.

homepage.description: Canonical URL for the upstream methodology or project homepage.

support.description: URL (GitHub issues, forum) or email address for policy support.
